message:
fix(planner): respect table qualifier in index usability analysis

The index usability check only compared column names without verifying
the table qualifier, causing terms like `orders.id = ?` to incorrectly
match an index on `users.id` when both tables have an `id` column.

Now checks wc.table against index.table when the qualifier is present.
Unqualified columns are conservatively considered matching.

Adds regression test for qualified column rejection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
